introSection: Paradise Fall is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Sun World Da Nang Downtown in Đà Nẵng, Vietnam. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on 9 April 2018.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders per train.

fullText:
Paradise Fall is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster located at Sun World Da Nang Downtown in Đà Nẵng, Vietnam. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on 9 April 2018.



7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders per train.
